name: Expense Entry Link
script: # After the Journal Entry has been successfully created and submitted if journal_entry.accounts: journal_entry.insert() journal_entry.submit() # Add the Journal Entry to the Connections section expense_entry = frappe.get_doc("Expense Entry", doc.name) # Create a new connection entry for the Journal Entry expense_entry.append('links', { 'link_doctype': 'Journal Entry', # The doctype for the linked document 'link_name': journal_entry.name, # The name of the linked document (Journal Entry) 'link_title': journal_entry.name, # Optional: Title for the link (you can use the Journal Entry name here) 'link_type': 'Document', # The link type is usually 'Document' }) # Save the Expense Entry document after adding the link expense_entry.save() # Add clickable link in the success message frappe.msgprint(f"Journal Entry {journal_entry.name} created successfully for Expense Entry {doc.name}.") else: frappe.throw("No valid account entries were found to create a Journal Entry.")

name: Expense Entry.
script: # Validate that the accounts table is not empty if not doc.expense_entry_account: frappe.throw("The expense_entry_account table is empty. Cannot create a Journal Entry.") # Create a new Journal Entry journal_entry = frappe.get_doc({ "doctype": "Journal Entry", "voucher_type": "Journal Entry", # Adjust as needed "posting_date": doc.date, # Replace with your actual posting date field "user_remark": doc.user_remark or "", # Add remark at Journal Entry level "accounts": [] # Initialize the accounts table }) # Populate the accounts table in the Journal Entry for row in doc.expense_entry_account: # Loop through the child table 'expense_entry_account' # First Debit entry if row.account and row.taxable_amount: journal_entry.append("accounts", { "account": row.account, "debit_in_account_currency": row.taxable_amount, "credit_in_account_currency": 0, "cost_center": row.cost_center, # Always fill user_remark (row-level if exists, otherwise parent-level) "user_remark": row.user_remark or doc.user_remark or "" }) # Second Debit entry: VAT if row.vat_account and row.vat_amount: journal_entry.append("accounts", { "account": row.vat_account, "debit_in_account_currency": row.vat_amount, "credit_in_account_currency": 0, "cost_center": row.cost_center, "user_remark": row.user_remark or doc.user_remark or "" }) # Credit entry: Payment account if doc.payment_account and doc.paid_amount: journal_entry.append("accounts", { "account": doc.payment_account, "debit_in_account_currency": 0, "credit_in_account_currency": doc.paid_amount, "party_type": doc.party_type, "cost_center": doc.custom_cost_center, "user_remark": doc.user_remark or "" # Always add remark }) # Save and submit the Journal Entry if journal_entry.accounts: journal_entry.insert() journal_entry.submit() # Link back to Expense Entry doc.db_set("journal_entry_name", journal_entry.name) frappe.msgprint( f"Journal Entry {journal_entry.name} " f"created successfully for Expense Entry {doc.name}." ) else: frappe.throw("No valid account entries were found to create a Journal Entry.")

name: Sales Invoice cancel
script:
# فقط نفذ إذا كانت الفاتورة مرتجع ولها فاتورة أصلية
if doc.is_return and doc.return_against:

    original_invoice = doc.return_against

    # =======================
    # عند Submit المرتجع
    # =======================
    if doc.docstatus == 1:
        frappe.db.set_value("Sales Invoice", original_invoice, "status", "Credit Note Issued")

    # =======================
    # عند Cancel المرتجع
    # =======================
    elif doc.docstatus == 2:
        # استعادة الحالة حسب outstanding_amount
        outstanding = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Invoice", original_invoice, "outstanding_amount") or 0
        if float(outstanding) > 0:
            new_status = "Unpaid"
        else:
            new_status = "Paid"
        frappe.db.set_value("Sales Invoice", original_invoice, "status", new_status)

name: Sales Invoice Credit Note Issued
script:
# فقط نفذ إذا كانت الفاتورة مرتجع ولها فاتورة أصلية
if doc.is_return and doc.return_against:

    original_invoice = doc.return_against

    # =======================
    # عند Submit المرتجع
    # =======================
    if doc.docstatus == 1:
        frappe.db.set_value("Sales Invoice", original_invoice, "status", "Credit Note Issued")

    # =======================
    # عند Cancel المرتجع
    # =======================
    elif doc.docstatus == 2:
        # استعادة الحالة حسب outstanding_amount
        outstanding = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Invoice", original_invoice, "outstanding_amount") or 0
        if float(outstanding) > 0:
            new_status = "Unpaid"
        else:
            new_status = "Paid"
        frappe.db.set_value("Sales Invoice", original_invoice, "status", new_status)

name: Sales Invoice items
script:
# Loop through each row in the items table
for item in doc.get("items"):
    # Force the math: Total = Amount + Tax Amount
    item.custom_amount_total_ = (item.amount or 0) + (item.tax_amount or 0)

name: Sales Invoicetax
script:
# Final ZATCA Fix for BR-CO-11 & Rounding Errors # الموقع: striangle.atmta-erp.com # التطبيق المساعد: ksa_compliance flt = frappe.utils.flt # --- المرحلة 1: التنظيف والتصحيح التلقائي --- doc.rounding_adjustment = 0 doc.base_rounding_adjustment = 0 doc.disable_rounded_total = 1 # منع التقريب التلقائي من ERPNext total_item_tax = 0 total_item_net = 0 sum_line_allowances = 0 for item in doc.items: # إصلاح مشكلة POSAwesome (سعر القائمة صفر) # إذا كان سعر القائمة صفر، نجعله مساوياً لسعر البيع لضمان خصم "صفر" if flt(item.price_list_rate) == 0: item.price_list_rate = item.rate item.base_price_list_rate = item.base_rate # حساب الخصم الفعلي في السطر (الفرق بين السعر المعلن والصافي) # الزكاة تراقب هذا الحقل (BT-92) بدقة line_disc = flt((item.qty * item.price_list_rate) - item.base_net_amount, 2) sum_line_allowances += line_disc # إعادة الحساب لضمان دقة خانتين عشريتين (ZATCA Standard) item.base_net_amount = flt(item.qty * item.base_rate, 2) item.net_amount = item.base_net_amount item.tax_amount = flt(item.base_net_amount * 0.15, 2) item.base_amount = flt(item.base_net_amount + item.tax_amount, 2) item.amount = item.base_amount total_item_net += item.base_net_amount total_item_tax += item.tax_amount # --- المرحلة 2: مزامنة جدول الضرائب والإجماليات --- if doc.taxes: for tax in doc.taxes: if "15" in str(tax.description) or "ضريبة" in str(tax.description): tax.tax_amount = flt(total_item_tax, 2) tax.base_tax_amount = flt(total_item_tax, 2) doc.total_taxes_and_charges = flt(total_item_tax, 2) doc.base_net_total = flt(total_item_net, 2) doc.net_total = flt(total_item_net, 2) # المعادلة الذهبية للزكاة: صافي + ضريبة - خصم doc.grand_total = flt(total_item_net + total_item_tax - doc.discount_amount, 2) doc.base_grand_total = doc.grand_total # --- المرحلة 3: التحقق والمنع (The Guard) --- # التأكد من أن خصم الفاتورة يطابق مجموع خصومات الأسطر total_doc_discount = flt(doc.discount_amount, 2) diff = flt(abs(sum_line_allowances - total_doc_discount), 2) if diff > 0.01: frappe.throw(f""" إيقاف الحفظ: الفاتورة ستُرفض من الزكاة (BR-CO-11)

هناك عدم تطابق في حسابات الخصم:
- مجموع خصومات الأصناف: {sum_line_allowances}
- الخصم الكلي المدخل: {total_doc_discount}
- الفرق الحالي: {diff}

الحل: يرجى التأكد من أن الخصم الإضافي يطابق مجموع الخصومات الموزعة على الأصناف. """)

name: Set Accepted Status for Additional Fields
